sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43157" key="e(terokinhsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερο-κῑνησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43157.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">motion externally caused</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.225" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.225</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
